raw_consumer_statement:
Ive talked to multiple Amex managers and they claim that the dispute team is being unfair, I first returned my product to the merchant XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX for {$2000.00} that was purchased XXXX XXXX from a return label they sent to me and added it to the box with the XXXX XXXX XXXX inside and sent it back. At first the merchant argued that the weight of my package was XXXX therefore I contacted XXXX and got a receipt for the package being XXXX and I will insert it right here. I also provided the return label matching what they sent me to return with the weight literally matching. 



After that now the merchant is claiming they have no proof of me returning the merchandise and they never received any content but they are the same merchant who emailed me telling me they have received my merchandise and I will be receiving a refund in a few business days. 


Now my last question for this merchant is if you claim I sent trash and you received something I want picture evidence right now of what I sent with my tracking number and name on the box because every shipping label has and tracking number and name on label so I can be sure you guys are telling the truth because this is unacceptable for me to be blamed with no pictures or proof or anything just word of mouth. Im providing all these documents and the merchant is just sending documentation with no proof. Im not paying this merchant if they can confirm a picture of my box that came in. Please Amex help me take care of this as you can see if I have alot of documentation proof and countered every single thing the merchant said.
